login.intro:
Sign in with GitHub to upload and manage AppStore packages.
Package names are first-come, first-served: whoever first uploads a name owns it under their GitHub account,
and only the original uploader (or an admin) can update or unpublish that name afterwards.

upload.dropHtml:
Drag a .deb here, or click to choose a file
Parsed locally as soon as you pick it — nothing is uploaded yet

preview.uploaderAs: Will be recorded as uploaded by @{login}
preview.needLogin: Please sign in with GitHub before submitting
preview.newPkg: New package name — after your first submission it belongs to you (@{login})
preview.newPkgAnon: New package name — after your first submission it belongs to you
preview.ownedBy: This package name is owned by @{login}; only they or an admin can update it
preview.versionTooLow: Version {version} is not higher than the published {latest}; please bump the version

form.sourceRepoLabel: Source repository (optional, public repo; a store section in app-builder.json can auto-fill screenshots and other store info)
form.storeLegend: Store info (optional; overrides info auto-filled from the source repo / deb)
form.iconLabel: Icon (optional, square PNG; leave empty to use the icon inside the deb)
form.screenshotsLabel: Screenshots (320×170, auto-cropped and resized; up to 6)

mine.empty: No published packages found that belong to you
mine.note: The list comes from the live APT index and only shows packages that belong to you. You can download published .deb files directly; unpublishing opens a removal PR.
mine.confirmUnpublish: Unpublish {name} {version}? This opens a removal PR.

decompress.loadFailed: Could not load the {what} decompression module (used only for local preview). Please refresh and retry; you can still submit — the server completes validation.
